articles.title: Married at First Sight UK rape allegations serious, says government
articles.description: A BBC Panorama investigation revealed allegations that two women had been raped during filming.

articles.title: Watch: Channel 4 boss asked if she will apologise to MAFS UK women
articles.description: The broadcaster's chief executive Priya Dogra walked away from an interview when given the opportunity to say sorry.

articles.title: New High Street crime unit to target gangs fronting shops after BBC investigation
articles.description: It follows BBC News exposing drug gangs, money laundering, immigration crime, and ghost directors linked to shop fronts.

articles.title: Wrongly jailed Malkinson says demand for legal fees is 'penny-pinching'
articles.description: Andrew Malkinson, who was wrongly jailed for rape, says being asked to repay legal fees is “penny-pinching”.
